subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen proclaimeth: We have fulfilled that which We promised. The Tablets that were revealed are for souls that have drawn nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید بانچه وعده نمودیم وفا فرمودیم الواحی که مخصوص نفوس مقبله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @growth of the Cause
